testcase.name: test_create_arrivo_with_detailed_materiali
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration56_features.py:97: in test_commessa assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create commessa: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create commessa: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"numero":"TEST-ITER56-1772287618","cliente_id":"","cliente_nome":"Test Client Iteration 56","descrizione":"Test commessa for iteration 56 arrivo materiale testing","data_inizio":"2026-02-28","normativa":"EN_1090","stato":"in_corso"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
